mission.title: surrealdb: Bug: Serialization error when using nested structs with a record id.
mission.description: Bug: Serialization error when using nested structs with a record id.. Users encounter: "`untagged or internally tagged enums do not support enum input`".

steps.title: Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:
```bash
surreal version
surreal is-ready
```
Look for error: ``untagged or internally tagged enums do not support enum input``

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Describe the bug

Using nested structs, where RecordId is anywhere except the top level, results in a serialization error: `untagged or internally tagged enums do not support enum input`

### Steps to reproduce

Using the following structs,
